parameters.content:
## Feature Request Prioritiser

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Workflow reads feature requests from embedded sample or via webhook
3. Set FEATURE_EMAIL_TO
4. LLM groups requests, assesses value, and produces ranked shortlist
5. Approval gate before results are distributed

parameters.jsCode:
// 20 sample feature requests spanning multiple segments and themes
const requests = [
  { id: 'FR001', title: 'Bulk export to CSV', segment: 'enterprise', votes: 142, source: 'intercom', created_at: '2026-06-01' },
  { id: 'FR002', title: 'Native Salesforce integration', segment: 'enterprise', votes: 98, source: 'intercom', created_at: '2026-05-15' },
  { id: 'FR003', title: 'Dark mode', segment: 'smb', votes: 321, source: 'productboard', created_at: '2026-04-10' },
  { id: 'FR004', title: 'Automated status updates via Slack', segment: 'mid-market', votes: 67, source: 'zendesk', created_at: '2026-06-20' },
  { id: 'FR005', title: 'Custom workflow templates', segment: 'mid-market', votes: 89, source: 'productboard', created_at: '2026-05-30' },
  { id: 'FR006', title: 'Role-based access control', segment: 'enterprise', votes: 210, source: 'sales', created_at: '2026-06-15' },
  { id: 'FR007', title: 'SSO (SAML / Google Workspace)', segment: 'enterprise', votes: 178, source: 'sales', created_at: '2026-05-01' },
  { id: 'FR008', title: 'Calendar view for tasks', segment: 'smb', votes: 255, source: 'productboard', created_at: '2026-04-20' },
  { id: 'FR009', title: 'Offline mode on mobile', segment: 'smb', votes: 112, source: 'app-store-review', created_at: '2026-06-05' },
  { id: 'FR010', title: 'Budget tracking integration', segment: 'enterprise', votes: 45, source: 'intercom', created_at: '2026-06-18' },
  { id: 'FR011', title: 'Time tracking built-in', segment: 'smb', votes: 198, source: 'productboard', created_at: '2026-05-20' },
  { id: 'FR012', title: 'Recurring task support', segment: 'smb', votes: 287, source: 'productboard', created_at: '2026-04-01' },
  { id: 'FR013', title: 'Microsoft Teams integration', segment: 'enterprise', votes: 134, source: 'sales', created_at: '2026-06-10' },
  { id: 'FR014', title: 'Guest / client access (limited permissions)', segment: 'mid-market', votes: 76, source: 'intercom', created_at: '2026-05-25' },
  { id: 'FR015', title: 'Email digest of overdue items', segment: 'smb', votes: 93, source: 'zendesk', created_at: '2026-06-08' },
  { id: 'FR016', title: 'API webhooks for external automation', segment: 'enterprise', votes: 56, source: 'developer-forum', created_at: '2026-05-12' },
  { id: 'FR017', title: 'Kanban board view', segment: 'smb', votes: 344, source: 'productboard', created_at: '2026-03-15' },
  { id: 'FR018', title: 'Gantt chart view', segment: 'mid-market', votes: 167, source: 'productboard', created_at: '2026-04-28' },
  { id: 'FR019', title: 'AI task description generator', segment: 'smb', votes: 44, source: 'productboard', created_at: '2026-06-22' },
  { id: 'FR020', title: 'Data retention and audit log for compliance', segment: 'enterprise', votes: 88, source: 'legal-team', created_at: '2026-06-01' }
];
return [{ json: { requests, total: requests.length } }];

parameters.subject: APPROVAL REQUIRED: Feature Request Prioritisation Report
